$description: Toggle (switch) component tokens — binary on/off control. Maps semantic color tokens to toggle-specific roles. Track and knob each have distinct off/on/disabled values; the knob slides on a pill-shaped track.

toggle.$description: Switch toggle for binary settings. Off state uses muted surface/border so it reads as inactive. On state uses the action color. The knob is always lighter than the track to remain visible in both states.

off.$description: Track fill when off — elevated surface. Receded but distinct from the page canvas.

on.$description: Track fill when on — phosphor green action color signals active state.

disabled.$description: Track fill when disabled — receded, non-interactive.

off.$description: Track border when off — standard UI edge.

on.$description: Track border when on — matches fill for seamless pill appearance.

disabled.$description: Track border when disabled — recedes to near-canvas.

off.$description: Knob color when off — muted foreground. Visible on the alt-background track.

on.$description: Knob color when on — on-action (dark) on the green track. Contrast: 11.1:1 AAA.

disabled.$description: Knob color when disabled — receded, matches disabled foreground.

label.$description: Label text beside the toggle — secondary foreground. Contrast: 8.0:1 AA.

disabled.$description: Label text when disabled — deeply receded.
